phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the Changing of the Guard is
phrases.text_local: La relève de la garde, c'est à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah ruh-LEV duh lah GARD say ah kel UR
phrases.cultural_note: The Changing of the Guard (Relève de la Garde) takes place at 10am daily in summer. The Royal 22nd Regiment — the Van Doos — perform in red tunics.

responses.english: At ten o'clock, every day in summer.
responses.phonetic: ah DEE-ZUR too lay ZHOOR ahn ay-TAY
responses.local: À dix heures, tous les jours en été.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the museum inside the Citadelle
phrases.text_local: Le musée à l'intérieur de la citadelle, qu'est-ce qu'on y trouve ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh moo-ZAY ah lan-tay-RYUR duh lah see-tah-DEL kess-KON ee TROOV
phrases.cultural_note: The Citadelle museum displays military artefacts, Royal 22nd Regiment history, and items from the Governor General's summer residence housed within the walls.

responses.english: The museum is inside, past the entrance.
responses.phonetic: luh moo-ZAY eh tah lahn-tay-RYUR ah-PRAY lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Le musée est à l'intérieur, après l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a guided tour of the fortifications
phrases.text_local: Y'a-tu des visites guidées des fortifications ?
phrases.pronunciation: yah-TOO day vee-ZEET gee-DAY day for-tee-fee-kah-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours of the star-shaped fortifications are mandatory to visit many areas. Tours run in French and English throughout the day.

responses.phonetic: wee lay vee-ZEET PART toot lay ZUR
responses.local: Oui, les visites partent toutes les heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view of the St. Lawrence from the walls
phrases.text_local: La vue sur le Saint-Laurent depuis les remparts, c'est incroyable ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah VOO soor luh san-loh-RAH duh-PWEE lay rahm-PAR say an-krwah-YAHBL
phrases.cultural_note: The Citadelle's ramparts offer sweeping views of the St. Lawrence River, the Plains of Abraham, and the Lower Town. A spectacular vantage point.

responses.english: The view is beautiful from the ramparts.
responses.phonetic: lah VOO eh mah-nyee-FEEK duh-PWEE lay rahn-PAHR
responses.local: La vue est magnifique depuis les remparts.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Governor General's residence is open to visitors
phrases.text_local: La résidence du Gouverneur général, est-ce qu'elle est accessible au public ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah ray-zee-DAHSS doo goo-vair-NUR zhay-nay-RAHL ess-KEL ay ak-seh-SEE-bluh oh poo-BLEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The Citadelle serves as the Governor General's official Québec City residence. Certain rooms are shown on guided tours during summer months.

responses.english: No, it is closed to the public.
